<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Logging\TeamCity\Subscriber; use PHPUnit\Event\TestSuite\Started; use PHPUnit\Event\TestSuite\StartedSubscriber; /** * @internal */ final class TestSuiteStartedSubscriber extends Subscriber implements StartedSubscriber { public function notify(Started $event): void { $this->logger()->testSuiteStarted($event); } }
